mapper.select: SELECT id, name, subtitle, icon_emoji AS iconEmoji, price, badge_text AS badgeText, description FROM transport_pass ORDER BY price ASC
SELECT id, name, subtitle, icon_emoji AS iconEmoji, price, badge_text AS badgeText, description FROM transport_pass WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO transport_pass (name, subtitle, icon_emoji, price, badge_text, description) VALUES (#{name}, #{subtitle}, #{iconEmoji}, #{price}, #{badgeText}, #{description})
